title: Pixelscape Hydra port over loaded clip

metricComparisons.description: Pixelscape's routed scale-plus-hue matte should materially increase frame-to-frame motion over the dry fixture baseline (observed ~+0.0062 on ci-smoke.mp4; threshold set at +0.003 for margin)

expectedVideo: the clip should stretch into a routed scale-and-hue matte treatment instead of remaining a polite color wash
expectedAudio: the coupled sound should widen and shimmer through the routed motion branch instead of reading as a flat detune
manualChecks: Does the tinted overprint feel like a composited moving branch rather than a whole-frame color wash?
